steps.title: Solve the first equation for x
steps.content:
The first equation is $3x = 12$. Divide both sides by 3 to isolate $x$:
$$x = \frac{12}{3} = 4$$

steps.title: Substitute x = 4 into the second equation
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 4$ into the second equation $-3x + y = -6$:
$$-3(4) + y = -6$$
$$-12 + y = -6$$
$$y = 6$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
